items.headline: Does Cummins’ Data Center And Trucking Push Reshape The Bull Case For CMI?
items.summary: Cummins recently participated in a Morgan Stanley data center power deep-dive and presented at the Wells Fargo Industrials & Materials Conference, while CEO Jennifer Rumsey joined 3M’s Board and an analyst upgrade highlighted stronger prospects in power generation and North American trucking.
